column1: Trea Turner headlines today’s Beat The Streak picks with a premium leadoff spot, a steady bat, and the juiciest park factor on the slate—expect him to set the tone and rack up knocks in Colorado. Right behind, Jonathan Aranda brings a reliable profile and the platoon edge against Mick Abel, making his lefty swing even more dangerous in a solid environment. Yandy Diaz and Brendan Donovan also offer top-of-order stability and favorable matchups, but Turner’s combination of role and setting puts him a cut above the rest for hitters looking to keep their streaks alive.
